meaning: n.带状配列,动植物的生物地理学的地带分布
examples: This ore deposit is characterized by mineral and element zonation.
In a simple "salt pan" the segregation is expressed by the zonation of saline minerals.
Division of Marine functional zonation system is our country sea area use management basic system.
The meeting comes as recognition that landscape-level planning applied to the biosphere reserve zonation concept requires the consideration of mining activities.
Consultation with the UK MAB Committee provides essential information about the suitability of the area, ideas for zonation and support with the application process.
